headline: Saperstein's Top Stocks For 2023: Microsoft, Lockheed Martin And This 'Unbelievable' Energy Name Up 30% For The Year
summary: Treasury Partners’ Richard Saperstein is out with his three best ideas for 2023. A pair of his top picks are up more than 30% year-to-date despite the market being on track to log its worst year since 2008.

summary: With 15 million daily users, Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN)’s Twitch is, by far, one of the most popular live-streaming platforms for gamers.
